testcase.name: test_create_and_delete_user

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm.py:100: in test_create_and_delete_user assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_vendedor_cannot_delete_user
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_materials_crud

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/materials/2787e5ee-97c0-415c-84f9-0cd0931e2b09 (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfe69eb24e510>, 'Connection to sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. testcase.failure:
